metadata.name: openvisioncapsule-tools
metadata.summary: A tool to help users to package, test OpenVisionCapsules

functions.name: openvisioncapsule_tools.command_utils.command
documentation: A decorator that associates command functions to their command name.

variables.name: openvisioncapsule_tools.command_utils.by_name
documentation: A dict that maps command names to their corresponding function

functions.name: openvisioncapsule_tools.capsule_infer.capsule_infer.validate_capsule
documentation: Returns errors if the capsule is not compatible with this script

modules.name: openvisioncapsule_tools.devices.devices
documentation: Copyright (c) 2024 AOTU, Inc.  All rights reserved. Contains Proprietary Information. RESTRICTED COMPUTER SOFTWARE.  LIMITED RIGHTS DATA.

methods.name: openvisioncapsule_tools.capsule_benchmark.capsules.CapsuleDir.__iter__
documentation: Iterates through directory, returning loaded capsules

methods.name: openvisioncapsule_tools.capsule_benchmark.workers.CapsuleThreadPool._warm_workers
documentation: Initialize the worker pool before starting the test

functions.name: openvisioncapsule_tools.print_utils._check_no_color
documentation:
Turns off color if the user wants.
See: https://no-color.org/

classes.name: openvisioncapsule_tools.print_utils.Color
documentation: ANSI escape codes representing colors in the terminal theme.

methods.name: openvisioncapsule_tools.capsule_benchmark.benchmarking.BenchmarkSuite.__init__
documentation:
---
param capsule_dir: Directory containing unpackaged capsules to test
param image_func: |-
  Function that returns an image. Can return the same
  image over and over, or different images
param num_workers: |-
  Iterable containing the different num_worker values
  to test
---
